description: Create a content slide with a left sidebar chapter navigation and a main-area vertical process flow explaining how companies should prepare early for frontier technologies.

header.headline: Frontier technologies are tomorrow's everyday reality – Prepare your company early on
header.sub: Actions recommended for companies across all sectors to proactively steer their future

items.text: Awareness of technological trends and foresightful analyses should be self-evident in a company's strategic planning. The goal is to identify impactful innovations early for best possible strategic response and integration. This extends to analyzing and anticipating competitors' innovation strategies, identifying potential new market entrants, especially IT/digital companies that could disrupt your market. To stay customer-focused and to anticipate changing needs and behaviors, identify technological innovations that your customers are aware of, are seeking out and/or want to use more of – and align your business accordingly

Be aware that new technologies can also imply business model innovations and prepare your company for them. Make sure to create the right mindset, capabilities and corporate identity so that you become the disrupter and not the disrupted. Identify which new technologies and technology-driven competencies will affect your business model to counteract any surprises
